card.name: CW01 Small Creature
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control leaves the battlefield, you gain 1 life. If this creature was sacralized, you gain 3 life instead.

card.name: CW02 Small Creature
card.text: Once each turn, when you gain life, you may untap up to one target creature you control. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CW03 Small Creature
card.text: Lifelink When this creature dies, revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: Honor's Fallen
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CW05 Small Creature
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) Whenever another creature you control leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: CW06 Small Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white XXX creature token. Warp {W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: CW07 Small Creature
card.text: Flying Creatures you control with power 2 or less have vigilance. Creatures you don't control with power 4 or greater can't block.

card.name: CW08 Medium Creature
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 for each other creature you control with power 2 or less until end of turn.

card.name: CW09 Medium Creature
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) When this creature is sacralized, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: CW10 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create two 1/1 XXX white creature tokens with lifelink. Augury — Whenever this creature attacks, if you exiled a card this turn, it gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.

card.name: Fate Smother
card.text: Augury — This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If you exiled a card this turn, it deals 5 damage instead.

card.name: Reach for Divinity
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until end of turn. Revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CW13 Banishing Light
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target creature you don't control until this enchantment leave the battlefield. Augury — At the beginning of each end step, if you exiled a card this turn, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CW14 Aura
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CW15 Removal
card.text: Exile target tapped creature. Revere (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CU01 Small Creature
card.text: Defender Augury — As long as you've exiled a card this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: CU02 Small Creature
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, mill two cards. {3}{U}, Exile three other cards from your graveyard: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CU03 Medium Creature
card.text: Once during each of your turns, when a card leaves your graveyard, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. {3}{U}: Surveil 1, then draw a card and discard a card.

card.name: CU04 Medium Creature
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CU05 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, mill four cards, then return up to one noncreature card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: CU06 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards. Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: CU07 Medium Creature
card.text: Augury — When this creature enters, if you exiled a card this turn, return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: CU08 MediumWall Creature
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, draw a card, then discard a card. {2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: CU09 Large Creature
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) When this creature enters, revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CU10 Noncreature
card.text: Enchant creature Augury — When this enchantment enters, if you exiled a card this turn, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controllers untap step.

card.name: CU11 Noncreature
card.text: When this artifact enters, look at the top card of your library. You may exile it. Draw a card. {1}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: CU12 Noncreature
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If they do, revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CU13 Noncreature
card.text: Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Revere (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: CU14 Noncreature
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: CU15 Noncreature
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: CB01 Selfmill
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) When this creature dies, mill four cards. You may return up to one creature card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: CB02 Aristocrats
card.text: Once during each of your turns, when a creature you control dies, you may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CB03 Selfmill
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Surveil 1. You may cast this creature from your graveyard by exiling a card from your hand and graveyard in addition to its other costs. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it.

card.name: CB05 Horros // Aristos
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Horror creature token. When this creature dies, if it was sacralized, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: CB09 Delveguy // Aristocrats
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Creatures you control have menace as long as a creature you control died this turn.

card.name: UM01 Small Creature
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and it gains flying until end of turn. {2}{G}{U}, Exile this creature from your graveyard: Surveil 1, then return up to one creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UM02 Small Creature
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. You gain life equal to its power.

card.name: UM03 Small Creature
card.text: Flying At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, tap up to one target creature.

card.name: UM04 Small Creature
card.text: Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less attacks, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less dies, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until end of turn.

card.name: UM05 Small Creature
card.text: Other Horrors you control get +1/+0 and have haste. Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) When this creature dies, create a 2/2 black Horror creature token. If this creature was sacralized, create two of those tokens instead.

card.name: UM06 Medium Creature
card.text: Once each turn, when a card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {4}{B}{G}: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: UM07 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, another target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains trample and haste until end of turn. Warp {R}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: UM09 Medium Creature
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've gained life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: UM10 Medium Creature
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature or another creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Archetypes SHD
card.text: {W}{U}: Celestial control {U}{B}: Unearth {B}{R}: Horror typal {R}{G}: Warp midrange {G}{W}: Lifegain {W}{B}: Sacralize aristocrats {U}{R}: Augury {B}{G}: Delve selfmill {R}{W}: Power 2 or less {G}{U}: Leaves graveyard

card.name: UM01 Small Creature
card.text: Once during each of your turns, when a land card leaves your graveyard, you may put it onto the battlefield under your control. {1}{G}{U}, Exile three cards from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: UM02 Small Creature
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, you gain 3 life and revere. (Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)

card.name: UM03 Small Creature
card.text: Menace Augury — Whenever this creature attacks, if you've exiled a card this turn, draw a card.

card.name: UM04 Grovekeeper 2
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put a creature card with power 2 or less from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom in a random order.

card.name: UM05 Small Creature
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Horror you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: UM07 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them during your next turn. Warp {1}{R}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: UM08 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, mill four cards. When this card leaves your graveyard during your turn, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 2/2 blue XXX creature token.

card.name: UM09 Medium Creature
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. This creature gets +X/+X, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn.

card.name: UM10 Medium Creature
card.text: Sacralize (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.) When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white XXX token. If it was sacralized, each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Depths Soulthief
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) When this creature enters, destroy target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of card types among cards exiled with this creature.

card.name: UM08 Medium Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. If this creature entered from a graveyard or was cast from a graveyard, draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
